sourcing.description: Every claim attributable. >= 3 cited sources per article. No hallucinated statistics.

scoring.90_100: >= 5 cited sources, all verifiable, mix of primary + analyst.
scoring.0_49: Zero sources cited OR any hallucinated statistic. AUTOMATIC FAIL ZONE.

sourcing.evidence_required: List of citations + spot-check 2 URLs for liveness

voice.description: Matches Marc's brand voice: direct, builder mentality, faith-informed, Ottawa-local.

scoring.90_100: Voice indistinguishable from Marc's own writing. Ottawa specificity present.
scoring.70_89: Voice consistent with one minor slip.
scoring.50_69: Voice mostly right but generic in places.
scoring.0_49: Voice mismatch (sounds AI-generic OR wrong persona).

voice.evidence_required: Comparison against Marc's voice reference samples

structure.description: Headers, scannable layout, >= 1 visual (chart/graph/table/image), CTA present.

scoring.100: All four present + visual is meaningful (not decorative stock photo).
scoring.75_99: All four present but visual weak.
scoring.0_49: Wall of text OR missing >= 2 elements. AUTOMATIC FAIL per Quality Doctrine.

novelty.description: Insight not findable in top-10 Google results for that topic. Original framing or original data.

scoring.90_100: Genuinely original angle OR proprietary data.
scoring.70_89: Strong synthesis of existing material with one fresh framing.
scoring.50_69: Solid summary of known material; light original angle.

novelty.evidence_required: Run topic through Google; compare top-10 results to article angle

compliance.description: Disclaimers present (financial / health). No medical or financial advice without qualifier.

scoring.100: All required disclaimers present and prominent.
scoring.0_74: Missing required disclaimer for topic. AUTOMATIC FAIL ZONE.

research_emphasis_for_daniel.override: sourcing weight effectively higher; require >= 5 distinct sources per digest section, not per article overall
